do_not_merge.reason: Strong identity field entity_type differs: 'committee' vs 'committee_role'. Test 1 (Contradiction test) forces do_not_merge. The relation_context shows a part_of_agency link from the role record to the committee, confirming they are related but distinct objects.

weak_aliases.reason: Shared identity key from validator, but not authoritative for merge due to entity_type mismatch.

suggestion.rationale: Test 1 (Contradiction test) applies: entity_type differs between 'committee' and 'committee_role'. This is a decisive strong identity field difference under the Entities per-kind rule (Person/title vs agency never merge; a committee_role is analogous to a title/role). The relation_context explicitly links the role record as part_of_agency to the committee record, reinforcing they are distinct. No merge possible.
